title: T-006 — SET-003 First Warehouse Step UI
prompt:
Implement the SET-003 First Warehouse Step page at `/onboarding/2` per PRD §14.3 step 2 + §14.4 SET-003.

RHF + Zod fields: `name` (required, 2-80 chars), `type` (select; default `finished`; options per Reference.WarehouseTypes), `code` (required, regex `^[A-Z][A-Z0-9-]{1,11}$`).

Submit advances state to step 3 via T-002 action; calls existing `createWarehouse` action (stub import — implementation belongs to 03-TECHNICAL or 05-WAREHOUSE feature, out of scope here).

No Skip button.

RED test command: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step2`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 2 RHF form for first warehouse; advances to step 3.
pipeline_inputs.details: Page + form component pattern mirrors T-005. createWarehouse import is stubbed.
out_of_scope: ltree path field for location (gap-backlog S-U3; out of scope here — that's step 3 anyway)
acceptance_criteria: Given empty form submit, when triggered, then 3 required-field errors and no updateOnboardingState call.
Given valid name/type/code submitted, when accepted, then updateOnboardingState({current_step:3, completed_steps:[...,2]}) AND router.push('/onboarding/3') fire.
Given code='ab123' (lowercase), when submitted, then regex validation error shown.
Given vitest covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED: RTL spec on 4 AC with mocked dependencies.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate Zod field constraints inline — share with createWarehouse schema if it exists.
